products.descriptionText:
What Are Our Astaxanthin Softgels?
Want to enjoy the benefits of astaxanthin without changing your diet or routine? Then these softgels are made for
you!
Astaxanthin is a fat-soluble carotenoid popularly known as ‘king of antioxidants’,
and while it is essential for our
metabolic processes, your body is unable to produce it naturally, so you have to consume it as part of your diet.
Since it’s typically found in seafood like fish and lobster, many people find it difficult to consume optimal
amounts of it.
One bottle of our Astaxanthin Softgels contains 240 softgels, and with an effortless 1-a-day
dose, you can enjoy its benefits for 8 months without reordering hassles. Each serving offers a

suitable for all.

like fish and lobster

middle of your busy
schedule

Made in the EU and packaged in recyclable PET bottles to be a smart choice for the environment
Backed by our 90-day money-back guarantee, helping you try them risk-free
Directions for Taking Our Astaxanthin Softgels
Simply take one softgel a day with a full glass of water, preferably with a meal. You can take it at any time during
the day, as per your preference. However, we recommend that you take this astaxanthin supplement at approximately

products.title: Mymi Wonder Belly Patches
products.descriptionText:
What Are Mymi Wonder Patches?
We know that stubborn belly fat can be the hardest to get rid of; so we want to help! Whether you are trying to shed off that last bit of fat for that summer bod or maintain your figure over the winter months, Mymi Wonder Patches have you covered!
Utilising transdermal technology, Mymi Wonder Belly Patches supply powerful botanical compounds to the targeted area to help you smash your dream figure goals . Start your journey to a more confident you today!
What is Korean Transdermal Technology?
Transdermal patches are an innovative and effective way of delivering vital compounds directly into the bloodstream through the skin. Instead of waiting for ingestible tablets to take effect and go through your digestive system, transdermal technology allows instant and consistent delivery of the desired compounds while the patches are worn. This allows you to precisely address the problem area . This innovative and efficient method of delivery is ideal for a multitude of bodily needs and is a powerful alternative to pills and creams.
How Do Mymi Wonder Patches Work?
The stomach area is infamous for being difficult to slim down. With this knowledge, Mymi set out to create a comfortable and non-invasive solution that focuses only on that area! How do they do this? Using the transdermal technology mentioned above, the patches consistently deliver revitalising and stimulating compounds to the skin and penetrate the fat below. These tummy patches are single-use and have been created to be hygienic and easy to use. Just place one of these patches on your stomach before you start your day and start feeling it getting to work!
Benefits of Mymi Wonder Patches
Lipid Metabolism
Sophoricoside, a compound isolated from Sophora Japonica, has been linked to the body dealing with lipids and sugar regulation. Capsaicin, the active compound responsible for spice in peppers, is well regarded for its thermogenic features which have been linked to healthy food regulation and weight management.
Energy
Caffeine is a natural stimulant believed to optimise physical and mental performance. Anecdotal evidence has also suggested that it can help manage appetite and hunger. Research has been conducted on this compound’s interaction with replenishing energy.
Weight
Catechins are said to have a protective effect on the body, helping to achieve a vibrant glow. Recent research has even connected them with weight management. Likewise, Salicornia Herbacea, or glasswort, is a unique ingredient from South Korea that’s been linked to glucose level balance .

products.descriptionText:
What are Warts, Corns and Verrucas?
Warts and verrucas are small lumps on the skin caused by the human papillomavirus (HPV). Although there are different types of warts, they are usually small bumps that can feel firm and rough and are usually painless. Verrucas, on the other hand, are a type of plantar wart commonly found on the soles of the feet or around the toes. They usually have tiny black dots underneath the hard skin and are more likely than warts to be painful. They both occur when broken or damaged skin comes into contact with the virus, making their spread from one person to the next very easy and this is why most people will encounter them at some point in their lives.
What Are WeightWorld's Wart, Corn & Verruca Patches?
Warts, corn, and verrucas can be both uncomfortable and embarrassing, often causing pain, irritation, and discomfort when left untreated. People may turn to a range of solutions like creams, ointments, or harsh treatments that are often messy, time-consuming, and not always effective. Whether it’s unsightly warts or painful verrucas, finding a natural and easy-to-use remedy can be challenging.
That’s where our Wart, Corn & Verruca Patches step in, offering a convenient, hygienic, and mess-free alternative to creams or other treatments. These self-adhesive verruca plasters are designed to naturally manage warts, corns, and verrucas without causing irritation or leaving behind scars. Our patches provide an ideal solution that works while you go about your day, making them a practical addition to your skincare routine.

products.title: Vitamin D3 Gummies
products.descriptionText:
Have you been getting enough of the “sunshine vitamin”? Vitamin D3 is one of the few vitamins that is hard to find naturally. That’s why we’ve developed our natural lemon-flavoured Vitamin D3 Gummies. With only one tasty gummy per day, you can get all the vitamin D3 your body needs! Reinforce, re-energise and give your body the sunshine it needs today!
Why Do You Need Vitamin D3?
Vitamin D3 is a fat-soluble vitamin that’s also known as the “sunshine vitamin”. This is because your skin produces vitamin D3 when exposed to UV rays in sunlight. Vitamin D3 is quite difficult to obtain through your regular diet, which is why supplementation is necessary to avoid deficiency. Vitamin D3 has a multitude of benefits for your body. Vitamin D3 contributes to:
Normal absorption/utilisation of calcium and phosphorus
Normal blood calcium levels
Maintenance of normal bones
Maintenance of normal muscle function
Maintenance of normal teeth
Normal function of the immune system
Has a role in the process of cell division
With so many benefits, vitamin D3 is essential for our bodies and plays a vital role in our natural bodily functions.
Can’t I Just Stay Out in the Sun?
The easiest way to produce vitamin D3 is when our skin absorbs the UV rays from the sun. This is because many of us are aware of the risks of exposing our skin to UV rays without protection. Wearing sunscreen or clothing that covers up much of your skin will greatly reduce the amount of vitamin D3 your body will produce as your skin is being shielded from UV rays exposure. Obtaining vitamin D3 from sunshine is effective but is not considered to be the safest method. That’s where our Vitamin D3 gummies come in!
Why Take WeightWorld’s Vitamin D3 Gummies?
We have developed our Vitamin D3 Gummy supplement so you can get all the goodness you need in a fun, easy and tasty lemon-flavoured gummy! Considering you can only get around 570IU of vitamin D3 from a typical 3-ounce portion of salmon (one of the best natural sources of D3 from a regular diet), we provide over 7 times more vitamin D3 from just one gummy! Our one-a-day 4000IU Vitamin D3 gummies in bottles of 120 sugar-free gummies: a whopping 4 months supply! We at WeighWorld want to give your body the support it needs with the treat it deserves.
Who Are These Vitamin D3 Gummies For?
We have created our Vitamin D Gummies for anyone to enjoy. products.title: 8 Pad Abs Stimulator
products.descriptionText:
If you are looking for a fast, effective and convenient way to get toned abs from the comfort of your own home, look no further than the EMS advanced workout offered by the 8 Pad EMS Abs Stimulator . Our sophisticated TENS machine works using painless electrical impulses to contract and relax your muscles for a deep ab workout that can be carried out in under 30 minutes. With 6 modes, you can also customise your workout to suit your individual needs and the replaceable gel pads use a safe, natural adhesive that make these pads suitable for sensitive and allergy prone skin.
Features:
Saves Time - No need for endless crunches, The 8 Pad EMS Abs Stimulator is great for a quick 12 minute ab blast.
Customised Sessions - 6 modes of function means you can tailor a workout that is perfect for you.
High-Quality Material - Comfortable, irritant free material makes for a pleasant wearing experience in session.
Hypoallergenic - Our pads use hypoallergenic gel that is suitable for sensitive skin.
Disclaimer: If you have any pre-existing heart or nervous system problems, or you have a pacemaker fitted, we recommend consulting your GP before using this product.
HOW IT WORKS?
Here's how our advenced EMS Abs Stimulator works -
Step One - Charge the batteries in the main console of the device.
Step Two - Attach the main console device to the centre of the gel pad pack via the two buttons.
Step Three - Remove gel pad cover and make sure your abdominal area is clean and dry .
Step Four - Then place the gel pads on to your abdominal area, ensure they are placed down flat and then smoothed over for the gel adhesive to properly stick.
WHAT'S IN THE BOX?
8 Abdominal Gel Pads
2 Additional Arm/Legs Pads
3 Controllers
1 User Manual
1 Charging cable
Step Five - Turn on the device using the 'ON/INC' button on the console device.
Step 6 - The device will begin stimulation and the mode of stimulation can be changed by pressing the 'programme' button, the intensity of the sensations can be altered by pressing either the 'ON/INC' or 'OFF/DEC' button.
USE ON ALL BODY PARTS
Get more use out of a TENS machine with our EMS Abs Stimulator . The additional arm pads make this device great for building both arm and leg muscles too. The EMS module itself can also be applied to work on the small of the back.
6 Modes & 10 Intensity Levels
Whether you are a fitness fanatic or a total newcomer, the 8 Pad EMS Abs Stimulator delivers a workout that is ideal for you. 6 specific modes and 10 levels of intensity mean that you can customise your session to suit your experience level or workout goals.
STEPS TO USE THE GEL SHEET
Replacing the gel pads is also a near enough effortless task! Simply take a replacement pad in your hand, peel a way one side of the protective seal to reveal the adhesive of one side of the pad. Then place the sticky side face down on the pad you are replacing (making sure the pad is clean and dry first). Then simply peel back the other seal new gel pad will be ready to use.

Nausea
Ginger is often used as a palate cleanser due to its fresh and clear taste. However, it has also been used to help settle stomachs when they are undergoing a chemical imbalance. Studies have linked it to the process of calming digestion, which is essential for maintaining your wellbeing. Aside from this, ginger in our organic ginger capsules is also a popular cleansing, calming ingredient which people often have who are feeling unwell. Though nausea itself passes with time, it is very irritating and debilitating, meaning that quick relief can allow you the opportunity to carry on your day unimpeded.
Cleansing
Ginger is also known for its cleansing properties, which are great for ridding your body of unwanted chemicals and elements that could cause you discomfort. This is because it has been linked to the process of gastric emptying, which rids your body of such things. Such processes are particularly important for the heart, and the equilibrium in the blood vessels. Attached to this element of ginger supplementation, you may also find that ginger has a potent kick to it, which can give you an added boost of invigoration and put a spring in your step. This can help you speed up your internal functions and naturally clear away toxins.
Joints
Another reason to consider our organic ginger supplement is its use as a natural way to support healthy joints. There have been studies carried out that have linked ginger to both inflammation and joint health. The process of inflammation in joints is typically what causes problems which can get worse later on in life if the right preventive and supportive lifestyle measures are not pursued.
Our Organic Ginger Capsules pack in 650mg of pure ginger extracts that offer all the above-mentioned benefits to support your overall well-being.

products.title: Exercise Vibration Plate
products.descriptionText:
What is a Vibration Plate?
A vibration plate is a unique vibrating exercise machine that can help strengthen core muscles and improve fitness. The device creates vibrations that cause the body's muscles to contract with each vibration. These rapid muscle contractions can help support balance, posture, flexibility and muscle toning in those who use the machine regularly. In addition, these vibrations can also help with recovery after exercise and support normal circulation throughout the body. Using vibration plates is a great way to add extra intensity to your workout routine.
WW Exercise Vibration Plate
Get a full-body workout from the comfort of your own home. This advanced exercise vibration machine facilitates a huge variation of poses that work to address individual muscle groups with sophisticated vibration technology that takes aim at fat and muscle.
INTEGRATED BLUETOOTH SPEAKERS
Music and exercise go hand in hand, that is why our premium full-body vibration plates come with a built-in Bluetooth speaker. That way you can pump out your favourite tunes whilst pumping your muscles at the same time.
FITNESS + JOINT CARE
The passive nature of the vibration technology also makes it the ideal choice of machine for people looking to boost their fitness, whilst also rehabilitating from injury, or joint problems too. Low-level vibrations are good for building strength and stability.
REMOTE CONTROL + LCD DISPLAY
No need to compromise your exercise by bending over and operating the machine manually during mid-session. The Exercise Vibration Machine comes with a handy remote for seamless operation as well as a clear LCD display.
99 Intensity Levels + 6 In-Built Modes
Whether you are just dipping your toes into home exercise or are a fitness veteran, we have something for you with our Exercise Vibration Machine. 99 Levels of Intensity and 6 modes means you can tailor a workout plan that is specific to your needs.
Sleek & Compact Design
Not too heavy or cumbersome and very compact, the vibro plate offers what other home workout equipment doesn’t in that you don't need a whole room to keep it in. Sleek and compact, it is perfect to fit in the modern household.
How do exercise vibration machines work?
When you step onto the vibrating platform, a destabilising effect occurs, stimulating muscles throughout the body. To regain balance and stability, the muscles are pulled or flexed. Depending on your position on the exercise vibration machine, your muscles around relevant joints will be stretched and stimulated by muscle spindles. This sends a signal to the brain via the central nervous system and then back towards the spinal cord for instinctive muscle contractions throughout your body. Compared to conscious training, more muscle fibres are activated due to these involuntary contractions happening at a higher frequency on the vibration plates - leading to increased overall muscle activity and faster results.
The WeightWorld Vibration Plate comes with a handy remote control , a built-in Bluetooth speaker to play music while you work out and 5 exercise bands , so you get a very versatile exercise machine that works your whole body by using it for just 15 minutes a day.

products.descriptionText:
What Are Our White Kidney Bean Extract Capsules?
Are you looking to manage your weight, but don't want to completely give up your much loved bread, pasta and potatoes? Seeking some reliable and natural carb blocker tablets or capsules? By acting as a natural carb blocker, our White Kidney Bean Extract Capsules can help check the amount of carbs you eat from being digested , therefore helping to promote natural weight management , but without having to completely give up the food you love.
What sets our White Kidney Bean supplement apart from other carbohydrate blocking products is that it is completely made up of only natural ingredients . Focusing on the renowned white kidney bean extract as the main ingredient, one well known for its carb blocking properties, the formulation also combines other plant-based ingredients to make a truly unique supplement.
How Do Our White Kidney Bean Extract Capsules Help You?
As a natural carb blocker supplement, White Kidney Bean Extract is designed to help promote healthy weight management by helping you to control your carbohydrate intake and the amount of carbs your body digests. This makes it a perfect supplement for those looking for reliable carb blocker tablets or capsules to manage their weight naturally but don't want to give up their favourite foods or go on a strict no-carb diet. In this regard, our White Kidney Bean Extract Capsules could also be a useful option for diabetics to help control what they eat in a natural and safe way.
What makes our White Kidney Bean Extract capsules unique from other carb blocker tablets is that it is made from natural ingredients that have been carefully selected in their exact quantities to provide a unique formula. White kidney beans are hailed to be one of the best natural carbohydrate blocking ingredients around. The other ingredients selected in this superior formula are designed to perfectly compliment the White Kidney Bean, to help with other health benefits including supporting energy levels , to give a rounded supplement that you can really make the most of.
Why Choose Our White Kidney Bean Extract Capsules?
Here’s why our White Kidney Bean supplement stands out from other carb blocker tablets on the market -
Formulated with 19+ years of industry experience in making 200+ health supplements and devices
Each serving offers potent and high-strength 5000 mg of white kidney bean extracts
Our capsules also contain the goodness of zinc and chromium for overall well-being
Just 1 easy-to-swallow capsule a day, ensuring 6 months of uninterrupted supply
100% free from GMOs so that you enjoy the benefits without facing any known side effects
Our capsules are vegan and gluten-free, ideal for people on a vegan diet or with gluten intolerance
We offer you a 100% money-back guarantee within 90 days so you can try the tablets risk-free
How do carb blockers work?
-->
Carbohydrate blockers work by inhibiting the enzyme alpha-amylase that breaks down and digests complex carbohydrates. These are molecularly made up of many simple carbs linked together in a chain. These complex carbs have to be broken down into glucose by enzymes before they are then able to be absorbed and used, or the excess stored as fat.
When you take a carb blocker though, the enzyme is temporarily blocked, allowing the complex carbohydrates to pass through your system undigested. This means that they are not converted into glucose and therefore not stored as fat. They also do not contribute any calories or raise blood sugar levels. It still allows however, for the ‘good’ simple carbohydrates to be digested properly. As a result, you still receive the benefit and nutrition of the ‘good’ carbs, but not the ‘bad’ ones - a win-win situation!
Some may think though that if they begin taking a carb blocker supplement that they can eat as many complex carbs as they like. Taking one of these supplements doesn’t allow you to overindulge on your favourite pastas and breads, but it does allow you to manage and control your carbohydrate intake as well as allow you to have the occasional treat without the guilt.
What is the difference between simple and complex carbohydrates?
Simple Carbohydrates
These can be easily broken down by the body and are found naturally in foods such as fruit, jam, brown sugar, milk & honey.
Complex Carbohydrates
These take longer for the body to break down and are found in starchy foods such as bread, pasta, potatoes, rice & beans.

products.title: L-Taurine Capsule
products.descriptionText:
What is Taurine?
Classified as a conditionally essential amino acid, taurine is a crucial asset for your body. With it being the most abundant amino acid in our retinas and one of the most found in the muscles, heart, nerves and brain, it’s no wonder that taurine is often referred to as the “wonder molecule”. Many among the population can get sufficient taurine from a balanced and nutritious diet, as it’s naturally commonly found in meat, fish and eggs . If we can naturally attain taurine from our daily diets, why do we need to take supplementation? Well…
Why Take WeightWorld Taurine Capsules?
Taurine can be found in your everyday diet, but don’t let your body settle for the bare minimum and give it the power it needs to excel! Our bodies need anywhere between 500mg–2000mg of taurine per day, which means with two capsules a day, your body will have everything it needs to strive. With 180 capsules per pack, WeighWorld offers at least 3 months worth of taurine, and it doesn’t stop there, with our multi-buy offer , you can save money when you buy! Our taurine capsules are also all-natural and do not contain any harmful ingredients.
Who is Taurine for?
Have you found yourself aching and cramping after the gym? Are you feeling run down and need that extra support in the day? Taurine is an extremely versatile supplement that can provide a multitude of benefits for a wide range of people. Taurine is even used in formula milk for infants! With so many perks, many people from different industries utilise taurine to maximise performance . Here are a few examples:
Vegetarians and Vegans:
Due to the nature of the sources of taurine, it is hard for vegetarians and vegans to get a sufficient amount from their regular diet. Supplementation is necessary to ensure there is no deficiency in the body. This helps the body work as it should and function with optimal efficiency .
Everyday Workers & Busy Individuals
Whether you are busy at work or busy at home, sometimes life can become stressful, and the worst thing is having your head clouded with thoughts when you want to unwind. Taurine offers a calming solution without making you feel tired , so if you want to clear your mind and optimise your efficiency, these are for you!
With such a wide range of uses, taurine has a place in everyone’s life!
Advice
Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications or are under medical supervision, please consult a doctor or healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.
Storage
Keep in a cool dry place out of reach of children
